audio.description: The source audio file containing the speech to convert. Supports common audio formats including MP3, WAV, and OGG.

model_id.description: The identifier of the model to use for voice conversion.

voice_settings.description: Voice settings to override the default settings for the target voice.

stability.description: Controls the stability of the converted voice output.

similarity_boost.description: Controls how closely the output matches the target voice.

style.description: Controls the expressiveness of the converted speech.

use_speaker_boost.description: Enables speaker boost for increased clarity.

seed.description: A seed value for deterministic generation.
